title: AI & ML Engineer
company_focus: Google Cloud solutions and AI/ML consulting
description:
Company Description

What we do

Our mission is to build cultures of innovation at companies
by transforming the way they work, by modernising their IT
infrastructure & apps, and by elevating their customer
experiences. As a Premier Google Cloud partner, 5 “Partner
of the Year” awards in 2025, we do this by implementing
innovative Google Cloud solutions and by leveraging cutting-
edge AI & Machine Learning technologies.

Devoteam Google Cloud’s certified Cloud engineers build
disruptive solutions on Google Cloud Platform to give
organisations a competitive advantage. We migrate and
modernise legacy applications & IT infrastructure using
Cloud Native solutions.

We help our customers with their hybrid- and multi-Cloud
strategies and to get to actionable business insights
faster, by accelerating their Data & Analytics. Together we
create scalable, future-proof & secure data journeys. And we
build AI & ML solutions on top of this data to help
customers create better customer experiences. Next to that,
we give the workplace of the future shape with solutions
like Google Workspace.

Job Description

What will be your role

As an AI & ML Engineer, you will be at the forefront of our
artificial intelligence and machine learning practice in the
Netherlands. You will be the visionary and key technical
authority, responsible for shaping our AI and ML strategy
and fostering a culture of innovation within our team and
for our clients. You will play a key part for all AI and ML-
related inquiries, empowering both our consultants and
customers to leverage the transformative power of AI on
Google Cloud. In essence, you are not just our technical
authority, but a trusted advisor to our clients and a
respected consultant in our team.

Your role is pivotal in driving our growth. You will
contribute to the development of our team's AI/ML knowledge,
collaborate with international counterparts, and work
closely with our commercial team to deliver cutting-edge
AI/ML projects. This is an opportunity to join a market-
leading practice and establish Devoteam as a premier thought
leader in the AI domain.

Qualifications

What we look for:

- You have 2+ years of experience in the data and AI & ML
  domain, with a proven track record of designing and
  implementing production-level AI & ML solutions.
- You possess hands-on experience with Google Cloud AI
  platform (or other similar hyperscaler experience).
- You have a strong understanding of machine learning
  concepts, algorithms, and best practices, including MLOps.
- You are an empathetic and team player, skilled at active
  listening and building strong, trust-based relationships
  with colleagues, partners, and clients from diverse
  backgrounds.
- You have a pragmatic approach to innovation, balancing
  cutting-edge research with the practicalities of project
  delivery. Your focus is always on delivering tangible
  outcomes and measurable ROI for our clients.
- You possess excellent communication, presentation, and
  storytelling skills, capable of conveying complex AI/ML
  concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
- You have an entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for
  innovation and are not afraid to try new things and
  challenge the status quo.
- You are fluent in both spoken and written English, Dutch is
  a big plus

Additional Information

What we have to offer

- A permanent contract
- A competitive salary package, in line with your profile &
  previous experiences, with annual holiday allowance and
  annual performance bonus.
- A competitive extra  Benefits  package that can include a
  company car, a phone allowance, a laptop, an internet
  allowance, a pension fund contribution and a budget for
  Dutch courses.
- A hybrid working environment with  4 weeks of working from
  abroad also possible.
- Continuous training & development of soft and hard skills,
  including training at several Google locations.
- An awesome dynamic team of colleagues & regular team
  building activities.
- An exciting job where innovation in technology is not a
  buzzword but a reality.
- The ability to work with the world’s leading companies in
  technology and innovation.

For more information about this vacancy, please contact us
at nl.recruitment@devoteam.com

A background check using publicly accessible information and
social media can be part of the process.
responsibilities: Serve as technical authority and visionary for AI & ML practice in Netherlands
Shape AI and ML strategy and foster innovation culture within team and for clients
Design and implement production-level AI & ML solutions on Google Cloud Platform
Empower consultants and customers to leverage AI technologies through trusted advisory
Drive team development of AI/ML knowledge and collaborate with international counterparts
Work closely with commercial team to deliver cutting-edge AI/ML projects
use_cases: Building AI & ML solutions on data platforms to create better customer experiences
Migrating and modernizing legacy applications using Cloud Native solutions
Implementing hybrid and multi-cloud strategies for organizations
Accelerating Data & Analytics to get actionable business insights faster
Creating scalable, future-proof and secure data journeys for customers
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role requires hands-on experience with designing and
implementing production-level AI & ML solutions on Google
Cloud. As a technical authority responsible for AI/ML
strategy and projects, the role involves working directly
with machine learning models and MLOps practices to deliver
tangible AI solutions for customers.
